title: NANOBOT F-NB-2-extended-inter-rater agreement witness v1
description: Witness schema for F-NB-2-extended-inter-rater audit on the n=60 nanobot Bayesian corpus (base n=30 from nanobot_bayesian_audit_n30.build_corpus_n30 + extension n=30 from nanobot_corpus_n30_dynamic_extension.EXTENSION_CORPUS). Mirror of ribozyme/spec/interrater_v1.schema.json. Captures Cohen's kappa per axis (sigma / tau / phi / J2) and pooled overall_kappa across rater_count raters scoring against the canonical n=6 lattice (SIGMA_6=12 / TAU_6=4 / PHI_6=2 / J2=24). PASS criterion (AND-gate): overall_kappa >= 0.6 (substantial agreement per Landis-Koch 1977) AND inter-rater stratified log_bf max < 5.0 (Jeffreys decisive ceiling, indicating prior labels were not over-fit). Reference: .roadmap.nanobot F-NB-2-extended-inter-rater sub-clause; raw_91 honest-C3 disclosure mandates PROVISIONAL_AI_ONLY tagging when raters are AI heuristics rather than human raters.

rater_count.description: Number of distinct raters. Minimum 2 for kappa; >= 3 recommended.

corpus_size.description: Aligned with extended F-NB-2 corpus (n=60: base n=30 + dynamic extension n=30 from F-NB-2-b).

per_axis_kappa.description: Cohen's kappa per scoring axis. Axis names match the n=6 invariant lattice axes (sigma / tau / phi / J2).

overall_kappa.description: Pooled kappa across axes. PASS threshold >= 0.6.

stratified_log_bf.description: log10 Bayes factor recomputed under each rater's labels independently, then min/mean/max across raters. PASS: max < 5.0 (collapses below decisive ceiling, indicating prior labels were over-fit).

overall_pass.description: AND-gate: both criteria must PASS for F-NB-2-extended-inter-rater PASS.

notes.description: Free-text audit notes. MUST carry PROVISIONAL_AI_ONLY raw_91 disclosure when rater_ids are AI heuristics rather than human raters (AI-as-rater is NOT equivalent to human inter-rater).
